name: Pickled Pepper Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup pickled jalapenos (including some pickling juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop each ingredient by hand or in a food processor.
2. Combine all the ingredients and add salt to taste.
3. Allow the mixture to stand for about 1 hour to allow flavors to blend.
4. Stir well before serving.
5. Yield: Approximately 5 cups
